payload.answer: Conflicting memory about Sam from Goldman’s children. The new statement says he has no children, which conflicts with the existing statement that he has two children.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children
New: Sam from Goldman has no children
repair_options: approve_supersession: accept the new statement and treat the prior statement as outdated
keep_both: retain both statements as conflicting memories for now
reject_new: keep the existing statement and discard the new one
edit: revise the new statement to a less conflicting form if the intended meaning is different
